figures.caption: Figure 2: Framework of NeuroOnline. (A) Overall pipeline: given streaming EEG data, NeuroOnline constructs multi-view augmentations, encodes representations with a backbone model, and integrates multi-view consistency learning (MCL) and context-aware representation modulation (CRM) for continuous online adaptation. (B) Multi-view consistency learning: representations from augmented views are aligned to mitigate pretraining–task misalignment. (C) Context-aware representation modulation: representations are dynamically modulated via contextual prompts to adapt to evolving data distributions.
